AI.motivation: 到2030年，每100名工人中有59名需要重新技能培训或提升技能，但企业技能差距的关闭时间从2014年的约3天增至2018年的36天。现有框架大多仅加速技能提升项目的单个阶段，且普遍缺乏行业验证，亟需一个经过验证的端到端解决方案。
AI.method: 提出一个端到端AI加速框架，系统性覆盖技能提升项目的五个阶段：知识获取、内容开发、内容审查与验证、教学以及评估开发，同时兼顾生产效率与学习效率。
AI.result: 美国国家会计委员会联合会（NASBA）审核并批准了基于该框架构建的技能提升项目，授予继续职业教育学分；3名学员完成项目后以极短时间通过NVIDIA认证Agentic AI专家考试（另有14人正在进行）；项目知识库支持生成包含1,267个风险项的高质量数据集，用于管理多智能体AI系统风险。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过AI加速实现了技能提升全流程的效率提升，并获得了专业认证机构的外部验证和学术级的下游分析产出，表明该框架在实践中具备可推广性和行业认可价值，为未来企业级技能提升提供了可复用的端到端方案。

title: SIVA-RL: Sensitivity-Invariance Visual Alignment for Multimodal Reinforcement Learning
summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) drives multimodal reasoning, but answer-level correctness does not guarantee that a vision-language model grounds its predictions in visual evidence. Existing visual-intervention methods contrast policy behavior on original and modified images, yet assign supervision by the type of intervention rather than its observed effect. This assumption fails: identical operators produce heterogeneous outcomes across samples. We propose SIVA-RL, a Sensitivity-Invariance Visual Alignment framework that replaces operator-conditioned regularization with sample-wise, outcome-conditioned supervision. SIVA-RL constructs localized interventions through token-aligned, distance-constrained within-image PatchSwap. A frozen audit policy then scores each clean-intervention pair, and the observed reward drop becomes soft routing weights. Large-drop pairs drive sensitivity alignment, low-drop pairs drive clean-anchored invariance alignment, and ambiguous pairs are down-weighted. This design decouples intervention construction from supervision assignment and is compatible with both GRPO and DAPO backbones. Across nine multimodal reasoning benchmarks spanning mathematical, logical, and vision-dependent tasks, SIVA-RL improves 3B and 7B models over matched RL baselines in every setting. It yields an 8.79 percentage-point gain on vision-dependent reasoning and up to 14.9% relative overall improvement across all four GRPO- and DAPO-based configurations.

AI.tldr: SIVA-RL 提出基于样本级观察奖励降幅的敏感性-不变性视觉对齐框架，通过解耦干预构造与监督分配，在九个多模态推理基准上一致提升 GRPO/DAPO 骨干下 3B 和 7B 模型的推理性能，最高相对提升 14.9%。
AI.motivation: 现有基于视觉干预的多模态推理方法按干预类型而非实际观测效果分配监督信号，但相同干预操作在不同样本上会产生异质性结果，导致视觉归因与奖励信号错配，无法保证模型真正基于视觉证据进行推理。
AI.method: SIVA-RL 构建基于 token 对齐与距离约束的图内 PatchSwap 实现局部化视觉干预，利用冻结的审计策略对每对清洁-干预图像打分，根据奖励降幅大小将样本软路由到不同对齐目标：大降幅样本驱动敏感性对齐，小降幅样本驱动以清洁图像为锚点的不变性对齐，模糊样本降权处理，从而将干预构造与监督分配解耦，兼容 GRPO 和 DAPO 骨干。
AI.result: 在涵盖数学、逻辑和视觉依赖任务的九个多模态推理基准上，SIVA-RL 在每项设置中均一致提升 3B 和 7B 模型性能，在视觉依赖推理任务上获得 8.79 个百分点的增益，在全部四种 GRPO/DAPO 配置上实现最高 14.9% 的相对整体提升。
AI.conclusion: SIVA-RL 表明基于观测奖励降幅的样本级监督分配比传统基于干预类型的固定正则化更有效，为多模态推理中视觉-语言模型的视觉归因对齐提供了通用且与强化学习骨干解耦的解决方案。

title: Peak-End-Net: A Peak-End Rule Inspired Framework for Generalizable Video Aesthetic Assessment
comment: Accepted to ACM MM 2026, Code: https://github.com/AMAP-ML/Peak-End-Net
summary: Video aesthetic assessment (VAA) aims to predict how aesthetically pleasing a video is, yet remains far less explored than other visual assessment tasks. Its progress is hindered not only by the scarcity of large-scale benchmarks, but also by the intrinsic subjectivity of aesthetic judgment, which is shaped by human perception. In this paper, we revisit VAA from a psychological perspective and propose \textit{Peak-End-Net}, a lightweight and interpretable framework inspired by the \textit{peak-end rule}, which suggests that people tend to judge a temporal experience mainly according to its salient moments and the ending. Building on this intuition, we first transfer knowledge from image aesthetic assessment (IAA) to VAA by introducing a pretrained IAA head to produce frame-wise aesthetic priors, which serve as surrogate signals for identifying aesthetically salient moments and guiding \textit{peak-end rule}-based temporal aggregation. To further capture how a video evolves aesthetically over time, we design an aesthetic rhythm encoder that models temporal progression beyond isolated moments. Additionally, we refine the overall assessment through a dynamic gated fusion mechanism to improve robustness under distribution shift. Our method is built on a frozen vision transformer (ViT) and requires only a small number of trainable parameters, making it scalable and parameter-efficient. Extensive experiments on two existing VAA benchmarks, including in-domain evaluation on VADB and cross-domain testing on DIVIDE-3K, demonstrate that our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance, affirming the value of psychologically grounded modeling for VAA. Our code and models are available at https://github.com/AMAP-ML/Peak-End-Net.

AI.tldr: Peak-End-Net 提出了一种基于心理学峰值-终末法则的轻量级可解释视频美学评估框架，利用图像美学预训练先验和审美节奏编码器，在 VADB 和 DIVIDE-3K 基准上实现了最先进的性能。
AI.motivation: 视频美学评估 (VAA) 的发展受到两个主要因素的制约：一是缺乏大规模标注基准，二是美学判断固有的主观性。现有方法多依赖纯数据驱动，缺乏对人类审美心理机制的建模，导致模型可解释性差且泛化能力不足。
AI.method: 提出 Peak-End-Net 框架，基于峰值-终末法则（人们主要依据体验中的显著时刻和结尾来判断整体感受）。首先利用预训练的图像美学评估 (IAA) 头为每一帧生成美学先验分数，作为识别美学显著时刻的代理信号并指导基于峰值-终末法则的时间聚合；设计审美节奏编码器对视频美学随时间演化的时序进程进行建模；通过动态门控融合机制优化整体评分以增强对分布偏移的鲁棒性。整个框架基于冻结的视觉 Transformer (ViT)，仅需少量可训练参数。
AI.result: 在 VADB 上的域内评估和 DIVIDE-3K 上的跨域测试中，Peak-End-Net 均达到了最先进的性能，验证了基于心理学建模的 VAA 方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该研究证明了将心理学原理（峰值-终末法则）融入视频美学评估能有效提升模型性能和可解释性，同时保持参数效率；为 VAA 领域提供了新的研究范式，即从认知科学角度重新审视视觉质量评估问题。

title: Music-to-Dance Generation via Atomic Movements
summary: Music-driven dance generation aims to produce human motion that is both rhythmically synchronized and semantically consistent with music. While recent neural approaches have achieved impressive visual realism, they typically model motion as a continuous signal and neglect its compositional nature, making generated dances structurally incoherent and difficult to control. In this work, we introduce a structure-aware framework that models choreography as a sequence of atomic movements-semantically interpretable motion events that serve as the building blocks of dance. To construct this atomic movement vocabulary, we first segment large-scale dance data and cluster them into atomic movement groups. We then employ a large language model to semantically relabel and refine the clusters, yielding a set of interpretable and reusable atomic movements. Based on these atomic movement annotations, we design a two-stage generation framework that mirrors the human choreography process. In the atomic movement planning stage, the model predicts the type, duration, and timing of atomic movements conditioned on the input music, forming a symbolic dance allocation. In the completion stage, a transition-aware generator synthesizes smooth and stylistically coherent motion conditioned on the planned structure. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method produces dances with significantly improved structural coherence, rhythmic alignment, and perceptual naturalness compared to existing baselines, while providing enhanced interpretability and controllable editing through explicit structural representation.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种结构感知的音乐驱动舞蹈生成框架，将舞蹈建模为可解释原子运动的序列，通过大规模舞蹈数据分割与聚类构建原子运动词汇，并利用大语言模型进行语义精炼，最终通过两阶段生成（原子运动规划+过渡感知运动合成）实现结构连贯、节奏对齐且可控的舞蹈生成。
AI.motivation: 现有音乐驱动舞蹈生成方法将运动建模为连续信号，忽视了舞蹈的组合性结构，导致生成动作在结构上不连贯且难以控制，缺乏可解释性和编辑能力。
AI.method: 首先对大规模舞蹈数据进行分割并聚类为原子运动组，构建原子运动词汇；再利用大语言模型对聚类结果进行语义重新标注和精炼，获得可解释且可复用的原子运动；最后设计两阶段生成框架：原子运动规划阶段预测动作类型、时长和时序形成符号化舞蹈编排，完成阶段由过渡感知生成器根据规划结构合成平滑且风格一致的运动。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在结构连贯性、节奏对齐和感知自然性方面显著优于现有基线方法，同时通过显式结构表示提供了更强的可解释性和可控编辑能力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究验证了将舞蹈生成建模为原子运动序列的有效性，揭示了结构化表示在提升生成舞蹈质量、可解释性和可控性方面的关键作用，为舞蹈生成领域提供了新的范式。

title: M$^\text{4}$World: A Multi-view Multimodal Driving World Model for Interactive Object Manipulation and Minute-long Streaming
summary: Driving-world generation has emerged as a core capability for scalable autonomous-driving simulation, yet existing methods remain limited in object-level controllability and long-horizon stability. We present M$^\text{4}$World, a Multi-view and Multimodal generative driving world model that synthesizes future surround-view video streams and synchronized LiDAR scans while supporting interactive object Manipulation and stable Minute-long streaming. Fine-grained object manipulation is realized through a flexible conditioning interface that supports explicit control over both the spatial layout and visual appearance of individual objects. Stable minute-long streaming, on the other hand, is achieved through a multi-stage training framework that enables online causal generation in only four denoising steps while maintaining coherent world dynamics throughout extended rollouts. Building on these components, we introduce an efficient few-clip post-training as well as a suite of visual reference-conditioned generation models, preserving general generation ability while allowing rare-case customization for long-tail controllability. To assess controllability beyond realism, we further introduce an automated VLM-based judging pipeline that evaluates scene-level condition adherence, view-wise object controllability, and cross-view object consistency. Comprehensive experiments show that M$^\text{4}$World consistently delivers high generation quality, precise controllability, and stable minute-long streaming. Together with downstream long-tail augmentation and scene editing, these results demonstrate the potential of M$^\text{4}$World for controllable, scalable driving simulation.

AI.tldr: M$^\text{4}$World 是一个多视图、多模态的生成式驾驶世界模型，能够合成未来环视视频流与同步LiDAR扫描，支持交互式目标操控和稳定的分钟级流式生成，通过灵活的条件控制接口、多阶段训练框架和少样本后训练，在保持高质量生成的同时实现了精确的可控性和长时稳定性。
AI.motivation: 现有的驾驶世界生成方法在目标级别的可控性和长时程稳定性方面存在明显局限，难以支持可扩展的自动驾驶仿真中对细粒度物体操控和长时间稳定生成的需求。
AI.method: M$^\text{4}$World 通过灵活的条件控制接口实现对单个物体的空间布局和视觉外观的显式操控；采用多阶段训练框架使得模型仅需四步去噪即可实现在线因果生成，并维持长序列中的一致世界动态；引入高效的少样本后训练和一套视觉参考条件生成模型，在保留通用生成能力的同时支持长尾场景的定制化。
AI.result: 综合实验表明 M$^\text{4}$World 在生成质量、精确可控性和分钟级稳定流式生成方面均表现优异；同时提出了一套基于VLM的自动化评估流程，用于衡量场景级条件遵从性、视角级目标可控性和跨视角目标一致性。
AI.conclusion: M$^\text{4}$World 在可控、可扩展的驾驶仿真中展现出潜力，可有效应用于长尾数据增强和场景编辑，为自动驾驶仿真中的目标级交互和长时间稳定生成提供了可行方案。

title: VideoRAE: Taming Video Foundation Models for Generative Modeling via Representation Autoencoders
summary: Video generative models commonly rely on latent spaces learned by 3D Variational Autoencoders (3D-VAEs). However, conventional 3D-VAEs are mainly optimized for pixel-level reconstruction, which can limit the semantic and spatio-temporal structure captured by their latents. Meanwhile, Video Foundation Models (VFMs) such as V-JEPA 2 and VideoMAEv2 show strong video understanding capabilities, yet whether their frozen representations can be transformed into compact, reconstruction-capable, and generation-friendly video latents remains largely unexplored. We answer this question with VideoRAE, a representation autoencoder that leverages multi-scale hierarchical features from a frozen video foundation encoder and compresses them with a lightweight 1D self-attention projector. VideoRAE supports both continuous latents for Diffusion Transformers and discrete tokens for autoregressive models via multi-codebook high-dimensional quantization. During decoding, a local-and-global representation alignment objective with the frozen VFM teacher improves semantic preservation and enables training without KL regularization. Experiments show that VideoRAE achieves strong reconstruction in both continuous and discrete regimes. On UCF-101, it obtains state-of-the-art class-to-video gFVDs of 40 and 93 with AR and DiT generators, respectively, while converging approximately 5x faster than competing autoencoder baselines. In a controlled 2B-scale text-to-video study, replacing LTX-VAE with VideoRAE leads to faster convergence under comparable settings. These results validate frozen VFM representations as versatile and generation-friendly video latents. The model and code will be released on https://zhxie0117.github.io/VideoRAE.

AI.tldr: VideoRAE提出了一种基于冻结视频基础模型（如V-JEPA 2、VideoMAEv2）的多尺度层次化特征，通过轻量级1D自注意力投影器压缩为连续或离散潜变量，实现高质量视频重建与生成，在UCF-101上取得最先进gFVD结果，且收敛速度比竞品快约5倍。
AI.motivation: 传统3D-VAE主要用于像素级重建，其潜变量难以充分捕获语义和时空结构；而视频基础模型（VFM）虽具备强视频理解能力，但其冻结表示能否转化为紧凑、可重建且利于生成的视频潜变量尚未被探索。
AI.method: VideoRAE采用冻结的视频基础编码器提取多尺度层次化特征，通过轻量级1D自注意力投影器将其压缩为潜变量；支持连续潜变量（用于Diffusion Transformers）和离散token（用于自回归模型），后者通过多码本高维量化实现；解码阶段引入局部-全局表示对齐目标，利用冻结的VFM教师模型提升语义保留能力，无需KL正则化即可训练。
AI.result: 在UCF-101类到视频生成任务中，VideoRAE使用AR和DiT生成器分别取得gFVD为40和93的最优结果，收敛速度比竞品自编码器快约5倍；在2B规模文生视频对比实验中，替代LTX-VAE的VideoRAE在相当设置下实现了更快的收敛。
AI.conclusion: 冻结VFM的表示能够被有效转化为通用且利于生成的视频潜变量，VideoRAE验证了这一范式在重建和生成任务中的有效性，为视频生成模型提供了一种更高效、语义更丰富的潜空间学习方案。
